error_signature: Notion node replaces original item data
title: Notion node overrides original data in workflow
symptom: After using the Notion 'Get Many' node, subsequent nodes cannot access original fields like 'title' from the API response.
applies_when: Data flow involves multiple nodes after Notion
not_this_if: Only using Notion node without further processing
No original data fields are needed after Notion
root_cause: The Notion node replaces the current item data with its own output, which causes loss of access to the original fields from previous nodes in the workflow.
fix_steps: Reference the original data directly from the earlier node using expressions, e.g., {{ $('Filter').item.json.list.title }}.
Alternatively, keep the original API item and merge it back after the Notion check to retain all necessary fields.
agent_instruction: Use expressions to reference original data or merge it back after the Notion node.
